case_title: RIGMAN, AARON MAX et al VS SELF, BRANDI et al

docket_entries.description: THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RIGMAN, AARON MAX TURPIN, ANGELA RACHELLE RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT SELF, BRANDI KETCHEN JR., MARK $1,674.75 PRINCIPAL, $20.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,694.75 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
MOTION FOR TIME PAYMENTS FILED BY DEFENDANT SELF, BRANDI KETCHEN JR., MARK HEARING SET FOR JAN-08-2001 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT KETCHEN JR., MARK

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON DEFENDANT'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT CROSS COMPLAINANT SELF, BRANDI KETCHEN JR., MARK IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY CROSS DEFENDANT RIGMAN, AARON MAX TURPIN, ANGELA RACHELLE PROOF OF SERVICE WAIVED. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
THE TERMS FOR TIME PAYMENTS APPLIES FOR EACH DEFT. EACH DEFT APPLIED FOR TIME PAYMENTS. $50/MONTH DUE 1ST OF EACH MONTH UNTIL FULLY PAID STARTING 2/1/01
SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION SEP-13-2000, CONTINUANCE ORDERED PER REQUEST TO OCT-27-2000 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT SELF, BRANDI
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL

CLAIM OF DEFENDANT FOR $1,900.00 FILED BY SELF, BRANDI KETCHEN JR., MARK AS TO CROSS DEFENDANT RIGMAN, AARON MAX TURPIN, ANGELA RACHELLE ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR OCT-27-2000 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
CERTIFIED MAILING TO AARON MAX RIGMAN RETURNED SIGNED.
SC MOTION DISPOSITION MOTION FOR TIME PAYMENTS OF JAN-08-2001, GRANTED

MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,674.75 FILED BY RIGMAN, AARON MAX TURPIN, ANGELA RACHELLE AS TO DEFENDANT SELF, BRANDI KETCHEN JR., MARK ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR SEP-13-2000 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
CERTIFIED MAILING TO ANGELA RACHELLE TURPIN RETURNED UNCLAIMED.
